# Smart Advisor

> AI-powered movie and book recommendation engine that builds a personalized
> taste profile through a short personality quiz and returns curated picks
> with detailed explanations tailored to each user.

## What it does

Smart Advisor asks users a series of personality-driven questions — including
preferences around tone, themes, emotional depth, and content maturity — then
uses Claude (Anthropic) to generate a single highly-personalized movie and/or
book recommendation with a detailed explanation of why it fits that specific person.

## Tech stack

- Frontend: React 18, Vite, TypeScript, Tailwind CSS
- Backend: Supabase (Postgres, Auth, Edge Functions)
- AI: Anthropic Claude Sonnet (claude-sonnet-4-20250514)
- Enrichment: TMDB API (movie metadata), Google Books API (book metadata)
- Hosting: Vercel

## Age-aware recommendations

The system adapts its question style and recommendation content based on
user age. Users under 18 receive family-appropriate recommendations.
Users 18 and older may receive recommendations involving mature themes
including dark content, moral complexity, and adult subject matter.

## Key pages

- /               Landing page
- /auth           Sign up / sign in
- /select-content Choose movies, books, or both
- /question-count Choose quiz length (5, 10, or 15 questions)
- /questionnaire  Personality quiz
- /results        AI-generated recommendation
- /account        Saved recommendations and account history

## Source

https://github.com/ponderrr/smart-advisor
